examples.title: Deadlock Detection Algorithm
examples.description: Finds deadlocked processes using available resources matrix
examples.code:
ALGORITHM DetectDeadlock
BEGIN
  Initialize Work = Available
  Initialize Finish[i] = (Allocation[i] == 0)
  WHILE process exists where Finish[i]=false AND Need[i] <= Work
    Work += Allocation[i]
    Finish[i] = true
  END WHILE
  RETURN processes where Finish[i]=false
END
examples.explanation: Simulates resource release to find unfinished processes
